infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Animus needs microphone access to record your dreams via voice.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Animus uses speech recognition to transcribe your dream recordings in real-time.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Animus uses your photos to personalize dream imagery with your appearance.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Animus uses this to show you relevant ads. You can opt out at any time.
